startup_profile.name: SkillBridge
startup_profile.objective: Build a practical MVP training platform for students and job seekers, focused on course delivery, learner progress tracking, certificates, and pilot partnerships with training centers.
startup_profile.problem_statement: Learners struggle to find affordable, structured, and trackable online training, while training centers need a lightweight platform to organize content, monitor engagement, and validate course completion efficiently.
startup_profile.target_users: Students, job seekers, instructors, and training center administrators.
startup_profile.execution_context: Small team, limited resources, short timeline, demo-ready MVP required.
startup_profile.mvp_scope_paragraph: The MVP must include secure signup/login, a learner dashboard, and payment integration for premium courses. In parallel, legal registration and pilot partnership preparation must progress.

features.name: User signup and authentication
features.description: Users must create accounts, log in securely, and access their learning space.

features.name: Learner dashboard
features.description: Learners must view courses, track progress, and resume learning.

features.name: Payment integration for premium courses
features.description: The platform needs a simple payment flow for premium courses.

admin_workflow.name: Legal registration
admin_workflow.description: The startup must complete company registration before formal partnerships and invoicing.

admin_workflow.name: Prepare pilot partnership agreements
admin_workflow.description: Prepare agreements to onboard pilot training centers and instructors.

mvp_plan.delivery_goal_paragraph: The MVP should be demo-ready by June 15, 2026, while legal readiness should support pilot discussions by May 10, 2026.

team.name: Amine
team.profile: Handles backend services, authentication, API logic, and integrations.

team.name: Meriem
team.profile: Handles learner dashboard design, course interface, and user experience.

team.name: Omar
team.profile: Handles planning, legal follow-up, partnership documents, and execution monitoring.

constraints.budget_context: The startup is operating with early-stage constraints, so the MVP must stay simple and practical.
constraints.execution_rule: The plan must prioritize a pilot-ready learning platform, not a full enterprise LMS.
